memoryArtifacts.headline: history
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Adam de Everingham, 2nd Baron Everingham (died 1388), Lord of Laxton, was an English noble who fought during the Second War of Scottish Independence and the Hundred Years' War.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Everingham於1307年出生在英國越可爾黑波恩時，他的父親Adam Everingham28歲，母親Clarice de La Warre27歲。他於1332年與Joan d'Eiville在英國諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年2月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓享年81歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Everingham于1307年出生在英国越可爾黑波恩时，他的父亲Adam Everingham28岁，母亲Clarice de La Warre27岁。他于1332年与Joan d'Eiville在英国諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年2月8日在英国諾廷加姆爾拉可頓享年81岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾拉可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Everingham was born in 1307, in Sherburn, Yorkshire, England, his father, Adam Everingham, was 28 and his mother, Clarice de La Warre, was 27. He married Joan d'Eiville in 1332, in Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 February 1388, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Everingham est né en 1307, à Sherburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam Everingham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Clarice de La Warre, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan d'Eiville en 1332, à Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1388, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Everingham 1307 in Sherburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Everingham 28 und seine Mutter Clarice de La Warre 27. Er hat 1332 in Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England Joan d'Eiville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1388 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Everingham è nato il nel 1307 nel Sherburn, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Adam Everingham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Clarice de La Warre, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan d'Eiville nel 1332, nel Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1388, nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Everinghamが1307年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシェルブルンで生まれた時，父Adam Everinghamは28歳，母Clarice de La Warreは27歳であった。1332年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエグマントンでJoan d'Eivilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年2月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンで81歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Everingham(이)가 1307년 영국 요르크실르 셔번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Everingham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Clarice de La Warre(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1332년 영국 노틴그함실르 그먼턴에서 Joan d'Eiville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 2월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 라스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Everingham nasceu em 1307, em Sherburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Everingham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Clarice de La Warre, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan d'Eiville em 1332, em Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1388, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Everingham родился в 1307 г. в местности ширбурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Everingham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Clarice de La Warre, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan d'Eiville в 1332 г. в местности эгмантон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1388 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

sm.from 1357 to 1358: mai le 1357 e o'o I le 1358

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Everingham nació en 1307, en Sherburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Everingham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Clarice de La Warre, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan d'Eiville en 1332, en Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1388, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
